summary: Partner Driver Ride Proposal + Payment Flow testing COMPLETE. All 27 backend API tests PASSED. All frontend UI flows verified working. Partner registration with C# integration, login with csharpToken, route calculation, setup-intent for Stripe 3DS, ride CRUD, available rides, admin rides manager all functioning correctly.

partner_auth.test_partner_login_success: PASS - Returns token and partner object with csharpToken when available

vehicle_categories.test_get_vehicle_categories: PASS - Returns normalized [{id, name}] from C# API (Luxury Sedan, Premium, Sedan)

route_calculation.test_calculate_route_success: PASS - Returns distance_meters and duration_seconds from Google API
route_calculation.test_calculate_route_invalid_addresses: PASS - Returns error status for invalid addresses

setup_intent.test_setup_intent_with_csharp_token: PASS - Returns Stripe clientSecret when partner has C# token

partner_rides.test_list_partner_rides: PASS - Returns rides for authenticated partner

available_rides.test_available_rides_returns_other_partn: PASS - Returns pending rides from OTHER partners

csharp_registration.test_create_partner_attempts_csharp_regi: PASS - Partner creation attempts C# registration, returns csharp_registered flag
csharp_registration.test_login_returns_csharp_token: PASS - Login returns csharpToken for partners with C# account

ride_csharp_submission.test_create_ride_with_card_submits_to_cs: PASS - Ride with card_id attempts C# submission, sets status to 'submitted_csharp' on success

backend_tests.admin_partners_crud: PASS - Create, read, update, delete partners all working

admin_rides.test_admin_update_ride_status: PASS - Can change status and add admin_notes

elements_verified: filter buttons (Toutes, En attente, Dispatch, Acceptee, Refusee, Terminee)

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes correctly implemented for testing
Vehicle categories normalized correctly from C# API to {id, name} format
Route calculation returns distance_meters and duration_seconds (fixed field names)
Stripe CardElement integrated with LIVE keys (pk_live_lX3FXPqGIJLP5NgXomcdpcWO)
C# registration includes Referer header (fixes P0 bug mentioned)
submitted_csharp status properly configured in DriverDashboard, RideDetail, and RidesManager
Mobile-first PWA design with proper French translations

partner_primary.note: Has existing rides and C# token

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed rides and partners created during pytest testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner/Driver PWA fully functional. All partner endpoints working: auth (with csharpToken), rides CRUD, route calculation, setup-intent for Stripe 3DS, vehicle categories from C# API, available rides. Admin endpoints for partners and rides management working. Frontend mobile PWA design is clean with French translations. Stripe uses LIVE keys - test cards won't work for actual payments but setup-intent endpoint returns valid clientSecret. C# registration fixed with Referer header.

mocked_api.note: No APIs are mocked. All endpoints proxy to real C# API at api.zont.cab. Stripe uses LIVE keys.
